message:
fix: resolve CI failures in Rust crates

- Fix jsonschema v0.29 API change: use iter_errors() instead of validate()
- Add toml dependency for fcp-cli
- Update connector module to use new SafetyTier/ConnectorHealth types
- Fix doctor::run function signature in main.rs
- Add missing test vectors for bootstrap tests (genesis.cbor, fingerprint.txt)
- Fix collapsible_str_replace clippy lint in capability.rs
- Fix test expectation for AlreadyExists error in bootstrap integration test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -72,6 +72,7 @@ serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1.0"
 ciborium = "0.2.2"
 semver = { version = "1.0.27", features = ["serde"] }
+toml = "0.8"
 
 # Error handling
 thiserror = "2.0"

@@ -27,6 +27,7 @@ serde_json.workspace = true
 sha2.workspace = true
 textwrap = "0.16"
 tokio.workspace = true
+toml.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
